workflow_goal: Run a governed read-only smoke test through the GPT GitHub workflow bridge to confirm that the live bridge runtime can create a low-risk workflow file.
validation_plan: Confirm the runtime returns created or updated.
Verify the target workflow file exists in Strategic-Minds/AUTO_BUILDER.
Inspect the generated workflow YAML for a manual read-only smoke test.
rollback_plan: Delete or revert .github/workflows/awos-bridge-smoke-test.yml if the output is incorrect.
